name_cn:
Genuine quality
Goyard ♛ Card bag 🏷 Essential for daily wear 💳
🔖G0YARD (Goyard) was founded in 1853, with over 160 years of history. The fabric is woven from hemp, cotton, and hemp fibers, then coated with glossy shellac, making it waterproof, sturdy, and durable. It is highly favored by celebrities, royalty, and nobility 🎉🎉
Uses exclusive wallet-matching custom glossy leather ✅ Perfect diagonal stitching 🧵✅ The yellow interior is custom top-grain cowhide [⚠️Not PU ❌Not split leather ❌]
Size: 10.5*7.3 cm
